multi_turn.content: How do I fix a broken link on my website?
Could you tell me which page the link is on?
It's on the homepage header.
I'm planning a trip to Japan next month.
Great! Are you interested in specific cities or sightseeing spots?
Mostly Tokyo and Kyoto. What should I see?
My computer keeps overheating.
Have you checked the ventilation and cleaned the fans?
Yes, I’ve cleaned the fans, but it still overheats under load.
Can you help me set up a new email account?
Certainly! Which email provider would you like to use?
Gmail, please.
What is the kernel trick in SVM?
The kernel trick allows SVMs to project data into higher dimensions...
Can you explain the mathematical intuition behind it?
How does PCA handle high-dimensional data?
PCA finds principal components that maximize variance...
What are the limitations of this method?
You are a very bad AI.
